case_title: DANIEL MULLAN VS. PENN-RIDGE TRANSPORATION, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY MULLAN, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT PENN-RIDGE TRANSPORTATION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MULLAN, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENN-RIDGE TRANSPORTATION, INC. $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,305.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY MULLAN, DANIEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULLAN, DANIEL HEARING SET FOR SEP-16-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL MULLAN IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S NAME IN THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE CHANGED TO REFLECT THE CORRECT SPELLING OF PENN-RIDGE TRANSPORTATION, INC. ORDER TO CORRECT NAME IN JUDGMENT WAS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL MULLAN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PENN-RIDGE TRANSPORTATION, INC. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PENN-RIDGE TRANSPORTATION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL MULLAN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PENN-RIDGE TRANSPORATION, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER OF THE COURT CORRECTING THE SPELLING OF DEFENDANT'S NAME IN THE JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-25-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PENN-RIDGE TRANSPORTATION, INC.
